iran_nuke.notes: Oman breakthrough (Feb 27): Iran agreed to never stockpile enriched uranium and full IAEA verification. No weapons-grade enrichment signals. Nuclear track de-escalated. However, Israel killed top Iranian nuclear scientists in recent strikes — potential long-term nuclear catalyst as Iran may reconsider deterrent posture. No immediate nuclear escalation signals. Netanyahu issued veiled threat to new Supreme Leader Khamenei.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 13-14. ESCALATION CONTINUES: IRGC directly fired on and stopped 2 vessels in Hormuz — first direct naval engagement by Revolutionary Guard. Thai cargo ship struck and set ablaze in Hormuz — Thailand lodging 'strongest protest' with Iranian ambassador. 3 cargo ships hit by unknown projectiles in/near strait. Treasury Sec Bessent: US Navy will escort tankers 'as soon as militarily possible' but military says 'not ready.' Oil ~$120/bbl, analysts warning $130+. New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei vows Hormuz stays closed. Netanyahu issued veiled threat to Khamenei. 1,348 Iranian civilians killed, 3.2M displaced. CNN: Trump admin had NO plan for Hormuz closure.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 13. Major escalation: Israel pounding Beirut suburbs AND south Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket barrage. Sweeping 25-mile evacuation order for southern Lebanon. War engulfing Lebanon — Washington Post: conflict pushing country to 'new precipice.' Lebanese University hit, 70+ killed in Lebanon strikes Thursday. 800,000+ displaced, 680+ total killed in Lebanon. Israel striking both Beirut AND Tehran simultaneously. Hezbollah sustained rocket fire continues.

turkey.notes: Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (2 incidents). NATO Article 4 discussions. Erdogan warns Iran but insists Turkey is 'on side of peace.' NATO forces building up off coast of Cyprus. Iranian drone hit UK base in Cyprus — proximity to Turkish interests. No Article 5 or mobilization.

india.notes: No India-Pakistan border buildup. Pakistan deployed army to Gilgit-Skardu to suppress pro-Iran protests. Shiite demonstrators attacked UN observer offices in Azad Kashmir. Conflict remains Pakistan internal/India-adjacent, not bilateral. No nuclear rhetoric.

russia.notes: Russia calls on US/Israel to stop attacks and negotiate. Kremlin signals intent to expand demands on Ukraine/NATO. Europe alarmed US spending weapons in ME that were earmarked for Ukraine. Russia continues arms supply to Iran. No direct ME involvement. Occupies ~20% Ukraine.

china.notes: Chinese flights around Taiwan paused ~2 weeks, resumed March 13. Trump delaying Taiwan arms sale for Trump-Xi summit (Mar 31-Apr 2). De-escalatory posture. DPRK condemns US ME attacks — China notably silent on conflict.

north_korea.notes: DPRK Foreign Ministry condemned US-Israel attacks on Iran as 'destroying regional peace.' Kim inspected weapons factory. No missile or nuclear tests. DPRK aligning rhetoric with China/Russia anti-US position but no military action.

russia_ukraine.notes: Occupies ~20% Ukraine. Russia continuing offensive operations — scorched-earth attacks putting Ukraine power grid near collapse. Ukraine struck Russian electronics plant supplying missile components. Russia increasingly using cheap Molniya fixed-wing drones. US weapons diverted to ME conflict alarming European allies. Kremlin sees opportunity to expand demands while US attention elsewhere.

latest_news.headline: IRGC directly fires on and stops 2 vessels in Strait of Hormuz — first direct naval engagement
latest_news.text: IRGC navy fired on and stopped 2 vessels after they ignored warnings — first direct engagement by Revolutionary Guard forces. Marks escalation from mine-laying to active interdiction.

latest_news.headline: Thai cargo ship struck and set ablaze in Strait of Hormuz — Thailand protests to Iran
latest_news.text: Thailand's Foreign Ministry conveyed 'strongest protest' to Iranian ambassador in Bangkok after Thai cargo ship was struck and set ablaze in the strait. International dimension widening.

latest_news.headline: US Navy to escort tankers through Hormuz — but military says 'not ready'
latest_news.source: CBS News / Al Jazeera / Sky News
latest_news.text: Treasury Sec Bessent: US Navy will escort oil tankers 'as soon as militarily possible.' Military officials say they are not yet ready. Gap between policy announcement and operational capability.

latest_news.headline: 3 cargo ships hit by unknown projectiles in and near Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Three cargo ships report being hit by unknown projectiles in and near the Strait of Hormuz. Shipping virtually halted despite escort promises.

latest_news.headline: Oil ~$120/bbl — analysts warn $130+ if conflict drags 6 months
latest_news.text: Oil settled near $120/bbl — highest in 4 years. Analysts warn conflict dragging 6 months could send oil 'north of $130.' 400M barrel reserve release failing to calm markets.

latest_news.headline: Israel pounds Beirut suburbs and south Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket barrage — 25-mile evacuation
latest_news.text: Israel struck center of Beirut in sharp escalation. Sweeping displacement order for southern Lebanon — residents up to 25 miles from border told to head north. Hezbollah rocket barrage preceded strikes.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu issues veiled threat to new Supreme Leader Khamenei
latest_news.text: Netanyahu made veiled threat directed at new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei amid continuing strikes on Tehran. Rhetoric escalating on both sides.

latest_news.headline: Russia scorched-earth attacks put Ukraine power grid near collapse
latest_news.text: Russia attacked critical substation supplying Kyiv. Scorched-earth attacks on energy infrastructure pushing Ukraine's power grid to near collapse while US attention diverted to ME.

outlook: ESCALATION ACCELERATING: IRGC has shifted from proxy/indirect to directly engaging vessels in Hormuz — significant escalation. Thai ship hit widens international dimension. 3 cargo ships struck by unknown projectiles. US Navy escort announced but military admits 'not ready' — dangerous gap. Oil at $120/bbl with $130+ forecasts. Israel escalating Lebanon front simultaneously — 25-mile evacuation, Beirut strikes. Netanyahu threatening new Supreme Leader. Russia exploiting US distraction with power grid attacks on Ukraine. Watch for: US Navy escort operations starting (could trigger direct Iran-US naval clash), oil crossing $130, Iran nuclear posture shift after scientist killings, Turkey response to widening conflict, any direct Iran-US military confrontation.
